recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure Transparency
recommendations.description: Develop and publish comprehensive ESG disclosures aligned with BRSR and GRI frameworks to address current governance gaps and avoid SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital on ₹20,000 Cr loan book saves ₹40-80 Cr annually.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India improved ESG disclosures leading to ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows.

recommendations.title: Implement Quarterly ESG Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Institutionalize quarterly ESG governance disclosures as per SEBI requirements to maintain regulatory compliance and rebuild investor trust.
recommendations.framework_section: BRSR:P6:Q15, SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Report
recommendations.profitability_link: Preventing regulatory penalties and avoiding cost of capital increase saves ₹20-40 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Publish TCFD-Aligned Climate Risk Report
recommendations.description: Prepare and release a Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD) report including Scope 3 financed emissions to improve ESG ratings and attract ESG-mandated investments.
recommendations.profitability_link: Achieving a DJSI inclusion could generate a 5-10% valuation premium, potentially increasing market cap by ₹500-1000 Cr.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: SBI's CDP B rating upgrade attracted ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows.

recommendations.title: Launch ESG Communication Campaign
recommendations.description: Initiate a targeted ESG narrative campaign highlighting governance improvements to enhance trust scores and support customer retention and talent acquisition.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved trust can reduce customer churn by 5%, preserving ₹100 Cr in annual revenue.
